problem id: 1c7c1246
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01101110 -> 10110111
  10111001 -> 00011100
  01010010 -> 10101001
  11111110 -> 11111111
  01011001 -> 01101100
  11101101 -> 00110110
  10100000 -> 01010000
  10101010 -> 11010101

query: 01001100
predicted answer: 00100110
